title: Tie review queue and navigation audit to proposal scope truth
summary: Tighten the relationship between native review queue, navigation audit, proposal scopes, and linked ticket truth so proposal artifacts stop living beside inspection and instead become first-class routing evidence for what needs review next.
acceptance_criteria: Review queue surfaces proposal linkage truth directly on component and view review items, not only inside separate proposal sections.
Navigation audit surfaces proposal-linked scope and ticket truth for the selected flow node, with truthful read-only guidance.
Shared linkage helpers are reused so review and navigation surfaces do not fork proposal-to-ticket matching logic.
Patch hygiene and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Created as the next ranked runner handoff slice before archiving the previous canonical runner chat.
Known separate blocker: archival cleanup of other HumbleStudio Codex tasks still depends on unavailable thread-management tools in the originating runner session.
Validated all 39 HS tickets after closing HS-0038.
Repo contract validation passed after refreshing status truth for the slice.
Web fallback integrity stayed green; this slice did not change fallback assets.
Repo-local workflow wrapper passed tickets, contract, script compile, web fallback, and diff hygiene checks.
Targeted macOS debug build passed after wiring shared proposal scope truth into review and navigation surfaces.
Repo-documented native CI build-only path passed in lane-1.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 Next Slices handoff after HS-0037: tie review queue and navigation audit more tightly to proposal scopes and linked ticket truth.

agent_notes: This ticket preserves the highest-value next slice so the runner chat can be archived without losing backlog truth.
If a new runner is started, begin here after re-checking repo state and any newly available thread cleanup tools.
Claimed lane-1 on branch `refactor/hs-0038-proposal-scope-truth` for the proposal scope truth native review slice.
